note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.gridpoint module functions.

methods.name: accel
methods.description: Get the gridpoint acceleration (vector).

methods.name: accel_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint acceleration.

methods.name: accel_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint acceleration.

methods.name: accel_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint acceleration.

methods.name: biot_modulus
methods.description: Get the gridpoint fluid Biot modulus.

methods.name: convergence
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint convergence value, defined as the ratio of the currenct local force ratio (gridpoint ratio member) to the target force ratio (gridpoint ratio_target method). A value of 1 or less is therefore considered converged.

methods.name: copy_to
methods.description: Copy the gridpoint state information from this gridpoint to the given gridpoint.

methods.name: disp
methods.description: Get the gridpoint displacement (vector).

methods.name: disp_small
methods.description: Get the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps. (vector).

methods.name: disp_small_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: disp_small_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: disp_small_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: disp_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: disp_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: disp_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: dynamic_mul
methods.description: Get the gridpoint dynamic stepping multiplier.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the gridpoint extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fix
methods.description: Get the gridpoint fixity condition. The first argument is the vector component.

methods.name: flow
methods.description: Get the gridpoint unbalanced flow discharge at a gridpoint.

methods.name: fluid_load
methods.description: Get the gridpoint additional fluid load.

methods.name: fluid_modulus
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint fluid bulk modulus.

methods.name: fluid_modulus_confined
methods.description: Get the gridpoint fluid flow confined modulus times nodal volume. This is used in the fastflow solution scheme.

methods.name: fluid_tension
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint fluid tension limit.

methods.name: fluid_unbal
methods.description: Get the gridpoint fluid out-of-balance flow : used in the fastflow solution scheme.

methods.name: fluid_vol_inv
methods.description: Get the gridpoint inverse of the fluid nodal volume..

methods.name: flux
methods.description: Get the gridpoint unbalanced thermal flux at a gridpoint..

methods.name: force_app
methods.description: Get the gridpoint total applied force at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity (vector).

methods.name: force_app_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint total applied force at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

methods.name: force_app_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint total applied force at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

methods.name: force_app_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint total applied force at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

methods.name: force_load
methods.description: Get the gridpoint user applied load (vector).

methods.name: force_load_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: force_load_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: force_load_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: force_unbal
methods.description: Get the gridpoint unbalanced force (vector).

methods.name: force_unbal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the gridpoint group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: gridpoint.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the gridpoint. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this gridpoint is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the gridpoint id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: gridpoint.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the gridpoint is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: local_small
methods.description: Get the gridpoint local small strain setting.

methods.name: mass_add
methods.description: Get the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion. (vector).

methods.name: mass_add_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: mass_add_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: mass_add_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: mass_gravity
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gravitational mass.

methods.name: mass_inertial
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint inertial mass.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the gridpoint centroid location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the gridpoint pore pressure.

methods.name: pp_fix
methods.description: Get the gridpoint flag indicating that the pore-pressure in the gridpoint is fixed.

methods.name: ratio
methods.description: Get the gridpoint local gridpoint mechanical convergence ratio.

methods.name: ratio_target
methods.description: Get the gridpoint target local gridpoint mechanical convergence ratio. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio (gridpoint ratio method) below this value is considered converged. See the convergence Gridpoint method.

methods.name: sat
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint fluid saturation.

methods.name: set_biot_modulus
methods.description: Set the gridpoint fluid Biot modulus.

methods.name: set_disp
methods.description: Set the gridpoint displacement (vector).

methods.name: set_disp_small
methods.description: Set the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps. (vector).

methods.name: set_disp_small_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: set_disp_small_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: set_disp_small_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint small displacement vector for the gridpoint. Small displacements are incremented from velocity and timestep only in small strain model. See the command model large. The small strain vector field is used in the interface logic to calculate overlaps..

methods.name: set_disp_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: set_disp_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: set_disp_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint displacement.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the gridpoint extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_fix
methods.description: Set the gridpoint fixity condition. The first argument is the vector component to set and the second components is a the fixity flag. The component starts at 0.

methods.name: set_flow
methods.description: Set the gridpoint unbalanced flow discharge at a gridpoint.

methods.name: set_fluid_load
methods.description: Set the gridpoint additional fluid load.

methods.name: set_fluid_modulus
methods.description: Set the gridpoint gridpoint fluid bulk modulus.

methods.name: set_fluid_tension
methods.description: Set the gridpoint gridpoint fluid tension limit.

methods.name: set_fluid_unbal
methods.description: Set the gridpoint fluid out-of-balance flow : used in the fastflow solution scheme.

methods.name: set_force_load
methods.description: Set the gridpoint user applied load (vector).

methods.name: set_force_load_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: set_force_load_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: set_force_load_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint user applied load.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: gridpoint.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the gridpoint group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_local_small
methods.description: Set the gridpoint local small strain setting.

methods.name: set_mass_add
methods.description: Set the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion. (vector).

methods.name: set_mass_add_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: set_mass_add_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: set_mass_add_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint added mass vector for the gridpoint. This mass is added to the inertial mass of the gridpoint during equations of motion..

methods.name: set_pos
methods.description: Set the gridpoint centroid location (vector).

methods.name: set_pos_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: set_pos_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: set_pos_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint centroid location.

methods.name: set_pp
methods.description: Set the gridpoint pore pressure. If the optional second argument is true in addition to modifying the gridpoint pore pressure, this method will fix the gridpoint pressure and update the accumulated pore pressure increment since the last mechanical step. The fluid flow calculation must be active for this option to be performed. To achieve the same result as the command zone gridpoint fix pore-pressure f, the methods pp_fix and pp must be used together.

methods.name: set_pp_fix
methods.description: Set the gridpoint flag indicating that the pore-pressure in the gridpoint is fixed.

methods.name: set_ratio_target
methods.description: Set the gridpoint target local gridpoint mechanical convergence ratio. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio (gridpoint ratio method) below this value is considered converged. See the convergence Gridpoint method.

methods.name: set_sat
methods.description: Set the gridpoint gridpoint fluid saturation.

methods.name: set_temp
methods.description: Set the gridpoint current gridpoint temperature.

methods.name: set_temp_change
methods.description: Set the gridpoint amount of temperature change that has accumulated since the last thermal/mechanical coupling..

methods.name: set_temp_source
methods.description: Set the gridpoint applied FISH temperature source at a gridpoint.

methods.name: set_tempfis
methods.description: Set the gridpoint flag indicating that temperature in this gridpoint is fixed.

methods.name: set_vel
methods.description: Set the gridpoint velocity (vector).

methods.name: set_vel_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: set_vel_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: set_vel_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: stiff
methods.description: Get the gridpoint accumulated gridpoint effective stiffness.

methods.name: temp
methods.description: Get the gridpoint current gridpoint temperature.

methods.name: temp_change
methods.description: Get the gridpoint amount of temperature change that has accumulated since the last thermal/mechanical coupling..

methods.name: temp_source
methods.description: Get the gridpoint applied FISH temperature source at a gridpoint.

methods.name: tempfis
methods.description: Get the gridpoint flag indicating that temperature in this gridpoint is fixed.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this gridpoint is live.

methods.name: vel
methods.description: Get the gridpoint velocity (vector).

methods.name: vel_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: vel_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: vel_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: zones
methods.description: Get a tuple of the zones attached to this gridpoint.
